findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests. Hardened performance flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper, 33 callsites refactored. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48. Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs. 74 files / 2537 tests.
GraphTemplatePanel coverage 21→47. Fixed 3rd silent-crash i18n bug. 74 files / 2563 tests.
GraphSidebar coverage 27→58. Defect-class regression EXPANDED — caught 4 more silent-crash sites. 74 files / 2588 tests.

useDragConnect coverage 35→67 (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.34): added 32 tests covering pointer-state-machine source guarantees (capture:true binding to outrace G6, left-click only, threshold activation, inner-60% skip, outer-ring activation, isDraggingRef coordination), snap validity invariants (self-loop, duplicate-edge via O(1) Set, clear when out of range), success path (animation trigger, callback signature, optimistic bidirectional Set update for rapid-dedup), cancellation paths (synthetic pointercancel from Escape with capture:true keydown binding, overlay clearRect, safeReleasePointerCapture), and the returned isDragging() callback. Replicated buildEdgeSet + edgeExistsInSet as pure functions to pin the algorithm: undirected-dedup invariant, parallel/reverse dedup, self-loop handling, 1000-edge scale check. Touch-aware sizing helpers tested for WCAG 2.2 minimum target (44px). Phase 2 sweep clean (no new defect classes — setInterval has matching clearInterval, addEventListener has matching removeEventListener, all setState in async paths use either mountedRef or fetchIdRef stale-guard pattern). Result: 74 files / 2620 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2620/2620 assertions pass; useDragConnect pointer-state-machine fully pinned; 33 days of cycles uncovered 10 real bugs and 1059 assertions added
